description: Study business, finance, management, marketing, accounting, economics, information systems, and entrepreneurship.
schools: Department of Accounting and Information Systems

name: Te Kaupeka Ako | Faculty of Education
description: Prepare for a career in teaching (early childhood, primary, or Māori bilingual settings) or youth and community leadership.

name: Te Kaupeka Ture | Faculty of Law
description: Study law, criminal justice, policy, and the legal system. LLB is typically combined as a double degree.
